adjustedPendingReservesFor(uint256).details: Recalculates reserves from (paidMints - burns) / reserveFrequency since the relationship between burns and reserves is not linear — it depends on the tier's reserve frequency.

returns._0: The adjusted pending reserve count (floored at 0).

afterCashOutRecordedWith((address,uint25.details: Reverts if the calling contract is not one of the project's terminals.

params.context: The cash-out context passed in by the terminal.

afterPayRecordedWith((address,uint256,ui.details: Reverts if the calling contract is not one of the project's terminals.

params.context: The payment context passed in by the terminal.

beforeCashOutRecordedWith((address,addre.details: Sets this contract as the cash-out hook. Part of `IJBRulesetDataHook`.This function is used for NFT cash-outs, and will only be called if the project's ruleset has `useDataHookForCashOut` set to `true`.

params.context: The cash-out context passed to this contract by the `cashOutTokensOf(...)` function.

returns.cashOutCount: The amount of tokens that should be considered cashed out.
returns.cashOutTaxRate: The cash-out tax rate influencing the reclaim amount.
returns.effectiveSurplusValue: The effective surplus value to use for the cash-out.
returns.hookSpecifications: The amount and data to send to cash-out hooks (this contract) instead of returning to the beneficiary.
returns.totalSupply: The total amount of tokens that are considered to be existing.

beforePayRecordedWith((address,address,(.details: Sets this contract as the pay hook. Part of `IJBRulesetDataHook`.

params.context: The payment context passed to this contract by the `pay(...)` function.

returns.hookSpecifications: The amount and data to send to pay hooks (this contract) instead of adding to the terminal's balance.
returns.weight: The new `weight` to use, overriding the ruleset's `weight`.

params.tokenId: The ID of the token to get the cashOut weight of.

params.tokenIds: The IDs of the tokens to get the cumulative cashOut weight of.

constructor.details: The initial owner is msg.sender; ownership is transferred to the governor after initialization.

params.tierId: The ID of the tier to get the current supply of.

params.tokenId: The ID of the token to get the first owner of.

returns._0: The first owner of the token.

params.timestamp: The timestamp to check the attestation power at.
The timestamp to check the total attestation units at.

params.account: The account to check for a delegate of.

params._baseUri: A URI to use as a base for full token URIs.
params._contractUri: A URI where contract metadata can be found.
params._currency: The currency that the tier contribution floors are denoted in.
params._defaultAttestationDelegate: The address that will be set as the attestation delegate by default.
params._gameId: The ID of the project this contract's functionality applies to.
params._gamePhaseReporter: The contract that reports the game phase.
params._gamePotReporter: The contract that reports the game's pot.
params._rulesets: A contract storing all ruleset configurations.
params._store: A contract that stores the NFT's data.
params._symbol: The symbol that the token should be represented by.
params._tokenUriResolver: A contract responsible for resolving the token URI for each token ID.

params.mintReservesForTiersData: Contains information about how many reserved tokens to mint for each tier.

params.count: The number of reserved tokens to mint.
params.tierId: The ID of the tier to mint within.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setTierCashOutWeightsTo((uint256,uint256.details: Only this contract's owner can set tier cashOut weights.

params.delegatee: The account to delegate tier attestation units to.
params.tierId: The ID of the tier to delegate attestation units for.

params.delegations: An array of tiers to set delegates for.

params.interfaceId: The ID of the interface to check for adherence to.

returns._0: The array of weights, indexed by tier.

tokenURI(uint256).details: Defer to the token URI resolver if set; otherwise, use the token URI set with the token's tier.

params.tokenId: The ID of the token to get the tier URI for.

returns._0: The token URI corresponding with the tier or the tokenUriResolver URI.

params.tokenIds: The IDs of the tokens that justify a $DEFIFA claim.

returns.baseProtocolTokenAmount: The amount of $BASE_PROTOCOL that can be claimed.
returns.defifaTokenAmount: The amount of $DEFIFA that can be claimed.

totalCashOutWeight().details: An NFT's cash-out weight is its price.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

BASE_PROTOCOL_TOKEN().notice: The $BASE_PROTOCOL token that is expected to be issued from paying fees.

CODE_ORIGIN().notice: The original DefifaHook implementation address used to distinguish clones during initialization.

DEFIFA_TOKEN().notice: The $DEFIFA token that is expected to be issued from paying fees.

DIRECTORY().notice: The directory of terminals and controllers for projects.

METADATA_ID_TARGET().notice: The ID used when parsing metadata.

TOTAL_CASHOUT_WEIGHT().notice: The total cash-out weight that can be divided among tiers.

adjustedPendingReservesFor(uint256).notice: Returns the adjusted pending reserve count for a tier, accounting for refund-phase burns.

afterCashOutRecordedWith((address,uint25.notice: Burns the specified NFTs upon token holder cash-out, reclaiming funds from the project's balance for `context.beneficiary`. Part of `IJBCashOutHook`.

afterPayRecordedWith((address,uint256,ui.notice: Mints one or more NFTs to the `context.beneficiary` upon payment if conditions are met.

amountRedeemed().notice: The amount redeemed from this game, excluding refunds.

baseURI().notice: The common base for token URIs.

beforeCashOutRecordedWith((address,addre.notice: The data calculated before a cash-out is recorded in the terminal store. This data is provided to the terminal's `cashOutTokensOf(...)` transaction.

beforePayRecordedWith((address,address,(.notice: The data calculated before a payment is recorded in the terminal store for `pay(...)`.

cashOutWeightIsSet().notice: Whether the cash-out weights have been set.

cashOutWeightOf(uint256).notice: The weight the given token ID has in cashOuts.

cashOutWeightOf(uint256[]).notice: The cumulative weight the given token IDs have in cash-outs compared to the `totalCashOutWeight`.

contractURI().notice: The contract-level metadata URI used by marketplaces to display collection information.

currentSupplyOfTier(uint256).notice: The amount of tokens of a tier that are currently in circulation.

defaultAttestationDelegate().notice: The address that will be set as the attestation delegate by default.

firstOwnerOf(uint256).notice: The first owner of each token ID, which corresponds to the address that originally contributed to the project to receive the NFT.

gamePotReporter().notice: The contract reporting the game pot.

getPastTierAttestationUnitsOf(address,ui.notice: Returns the past attestation units of a specific address for a specific tier.

getPastTierTotalAttestationUnitsOf(uint2.notice: Returns the total amount of attestation units that has existed for a tier.

getTierAttestationUnitsOf(address,uint25.notice: Returns the current attestation power of an address for a specific tier.

getTierDelegateOf(address,uint256).notice: Returns the delegate of an account for specific tier.

getTierTotalAttestationUnitsOf(uint256).notice: Returns the total amount of attestation units that exists for a tier.

hasMintPermissionFor(uint256,(uint48,uin.notice: Required by the IJBRulesetDataHook interfaces. Return false to not leak any permissions.

initialize(uint256,string,string,address.notice: Initialize a clone of this contract.

isReserveMint(uint256).notice: Whether a token was minted through reserves (free) rather than paid for.

mintReservesFor((uint32,uint16)[]).notice: Mint reserved tokens within the tier for the provided value.

mintReservesFor(uint256,uint256).notice: Mint reserved tokens within the tier for the provided value.

pricingCurrency().notice: The currency that is accepted when minting tier NFTs.

projectId().notice: The ID of the project that this contract is associated with.

refundedBurnsFrom(uint256).notice: The number of tokens burned from a tier during non-COMPLETE phases (refund, no-contest).

rulesets().notice: The contract storing all funding cycle configurations.

setTierCashOutWeightsTo((uint256,uint256.notice: Stores the cashOut weights that should be used in the end game phase.

setTierDelegateTo(address,uint256).notice: Delegate this account's voting power for a single tier to a specified delegate.

setTierDelegatesTo((address,uint256)[]).notice: Delegate this account's voting power across multiple tiers to specified delegates.

store().notice: The contract that stores and manages the NFT's data.

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: Indicates if this contract adheres to the specified interface.

tierCashOutWeights().notice: The cashOut weight for each tier.

tierNameOf(uint256).notice: The name of the tier with the specified ID.

tokenURI(uint256).notice: The metadata URI of the provided token ID.

tokensClaimableFor(uint256[]).notice: The amount of $DEFIFA and $BASE_PROTOCOL tokens claimable for a set of token IDs.

tokensRedeemedFrom(uint256).notice: The amount of tokens redeemed from each tier, excluding refunds.

totalCashOutWeight().notice: The combined cash-out weight of all outstanding NFTs.

totalMintCost().notice: The cumulative mint price of all paid and reserved NFTs. Decremented on burns/refunds. Used as the participation metric — immune to `addToBalanceOf` inflation because only actual mints increment it.
